applicability_notes: Unary elementwise activation. Golden registered as torch.nn.functional.softshrink. Test passes lambd as positional scalar kwarg; input bfloat16 (h, w) tensor converted via ttnn.from_torch with TILE_LAYOUT.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.softshrink(input_tensor_a, lambd=scalar); constraints: {'lambd': 'scalar, default 0.5, must be >= 0', 'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT required', 'pcc_threshold': 0.99}
